statement: This record remains negative evidence on build 26100: the repo did not produce enough supporting proof to promote it into a normal actionable surface.
gating_reason: Archived audit trail only. Keep this out of the normal tweak surface.

links.title: Current privacy provider CEIP bundle
links.summary: The provider writes AppV CEIPEnable = 0, SQMClient CEIPEnable = 0, and Messenger CEIP = 2.
